violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored over clean and sanitized utensils in the dish room. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Manager of the shared space facility notified. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable peeler, stacked hotel pans) were observed with an accumulation of food and/or sticker debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Peeler taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC and inspector observation, pork belly and eggs were placed hot in the prep unit refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Items were placed in shallow containers and moved to walk-in to facilitate cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Cleaned and sanitized plastic hotel pans were observed with an accumulation of water. Staff were observed wiping cleaned and sanitized dishes and stacking wet bus pans. Manager of shared facility notified. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The ice wand was observed stored unprotected in the freezer between uses. Utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer shield and walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
